# Sample test document

This is a placeholder text file used to test chunking and retrieval logic
in CI without requiring a real PDF parser. Replace with a real PDF if you
need layout-aware parsing tests.

A rolling-element bearing is composed of:
- an inner ring
- an outer ring
- a set of rolling elements (balls or rollers)
- a cage (also called a retainer)
- optionally, seals or shields

Basic dynamic load rating (C) is the load under which a bearing achieves
a rating life of one million revolutions. It is expressed in newtons.
